pages.title: VINCI_Document.pdf
pages.text:
AI and Chatbots requirements
AI will support the informational and community uses of the intranet. This AI should enable
an "augmented" search, both for content and for people.
In the long term, the aim is to offer chatbots on the intranet to address the questions (HR, IT
Support...) of the employees.
Finally, AI should also be at the service of contributors to facilitate contribution (text
generation, article formatting, translation, etc.).
On the other hand, a chatbot dedicated to the history of the Groupe is under development
(related project). The platform should plan to include this chatbot in a widget to enable a
user to access the service without having to leave the intranet.

The intranet must integrate features based on generative artificial intelligence to enrich the
user experience, improve access to information, and automate certain interactions. One of
the priorities will be the implementation of augmented research, capable of understanding
requests in natural language, offering synthetic and contextualized responses derived from
intranet content (news, documents, FAQs, procedures, etc.), and identifying associated
sources.
AI will also enable users to dynamically query internal content (e.g. What are the applicable
paid leaves? » or « Show me the process for requesting computer equipment ») through a
chatbot interface.
Thematic chatbots (HR, IT support, general services, etc.) can be deployed to automate
responses to frequent requests, guide users through their processes, or direct them to the
appropriate contacts. These agents must be configurable, secure, and interact with existing
knowledge bases (HRIS, DMS, ITSM, etc.).
Furthermore, generative AI will be able to offer content creation assistance features for the
contributors:
• Assistance with article writing (suggestions for phrasing, summaries,
reformulations, verification of clarity or tone);
• Automatic generation of summaries or titles;
• Generation of automatic translations;
• Proposal of keywords to facilitate indexing;
• Assistance with formatting according to the intranet's editorial guidelines.

pages.title: VINCI_Document.pdf
pages.text:
This assistance will aim to streamline content production, enhance quality, and foster
contributor engagement.

Here is the list of requirements we need to meet. It should explain if and how we support it
and ideally with some details on how it’s implemented.

 The requirements surrounding AI
IA 1 Enhanced Search with AI (Content, Profiles)
IA 2 AI conversational assistant integrated into the intranet
AI 3 Content Creation Assistance via AI
IA 4 Ability to dynamically query internal content (FAQ, procedures, documents...)
IA 5 Synthetic and Contextualized Responses Generated by AI
IA 6 Configurable thematic chatbots (HR, IT, general services...)
IA 7 Integration into a widget accessible from all pages
IA 8 Natural language interaction
IA 9 Access to sources associated with the responses
IA
10 Compliance with security and confidentiality rules (GDPR)
IA
11
Account and Administration Management (Who Can Create Assistants? Who can use them?
Deployment methods for certain users, specific sections of the intranet...
IA
12 Multilingual Management via AI (for Users and Contributors)

 The requirements around the search engine
RE 1 Search engine "plain text" on all content (news, documents, profiles, services...)
RE 2 Filtered search by content type, date, language, entity, division, theme, section
RE 3 Search by keywords or theme
RE 4 Automatic suggestions and query completion
RE 5 Intelligent Query Reformulation
RE 6 Direct answers to frequently asked questions (AI assistant type)
RE 7 Multilingual search with automatic language detection
RE 8 Displaying results contextualized according to the user profile
RE 9 Learning user behaviors to enhance results
RE
10
Multicriteria search on employee profiles (name, position, location, entity, fields of
knowledge, interests...)
RE
11 Configuration of search criteria by administrators

pages.title: VINCI_Document.pdf
pages.text:
Administrator Requirements
AD 14 AI Assistants/Agents (Creation, Management, Distribution)


 Cross- cutting requirements
AND
3 To be able to manage languages
ET 4 Having a multilingual interface capable of managing at least French, English, Portuguese,
Spanish, and German, or even other languages like Polish, Russian, Dutch...
AND
5 Enable automatic language detection (if not enabled, default to English display)
AND
6 Having a mobile web app (not a dedicated app but a web app, in a mobile browser)
ET 7 Being responsive on mobile
ET 8 Having Single Sign- On (SSO) authentication
AND
9
Having the capability to integrate with internal tools (HRIS, ITSM…) via semi- flat file
interfaces
AND
10
Having the possibility of integration with internal tools (HRIS, ITSM…) via partial API
interfaces
AND
11 Having other interfacing options besides API or flat files. Specify which ones if applicable.


AI
Does your company use one or more AI systems?
Please specify for each: purpose, name, version, publisher, level of confidentiality and risk
1st AI: name and version, publisher, purpose(s), level of confidentiality, level of risk
2nd AI: name and version, publisher, purpose(s), level of confidentiality, level of risk
3rd AI: name and version, publisher, purpose(s), level of confidentiality, level of risk
It is expressly required that no VINCI data must or shall be used to feed a Machine Learning (ML) system or
be retained by the AI publisher used.
Do you adhere to the following principles:
Non- retention of voice and visual data
Anonymization of data used for translation
Obtaining explicit consent from users
Limiting data access to authorized persons only
Transparency on the Technologies and Processes Used
Regular audits to verify compliance with GDPR and AI Act regulations
Implementing robust security measures to protect data
Right to be forgotten for users

pages.title: VINCI_Document.pdf
pages.text:
Use of deepfake detection technologies
Strict data retention policy
Integration of digital watermarks in content
